     the Fermi energy is    -0.2964 ev

!    total energy              =   -6614.59484302 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.7E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26636646 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137688.49875053 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69505.49546025 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2721.74858054 Ry
